title: VStatsSave Statement
description: The VStatsSave command saves all vision statistics in the current project to a file in the current project's directory.  The filename is the name of the project with an .STX extension.
notes:
Statistics are saved whenever Epson RC+ is closed.
  So typically VStatsSave is not needed.  However, if you want to reset the saved statistics, execute VStatsSave after executing VStatsResetAll, or VStatsReset.

When you are using the Compact Vision, the statistics file will be saved in the Compact Vision.
see_also:
Applies To

All vision sequences in current project
